arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wall -O0 -g -DSTM32F401xE -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T/home/zaid/stm32-doom-loader-app/STM32F401RETX_APP.ld -nostdlib -Wl,-Map=output.map "CMakeFiles/stm32-doom-app.elf.dir/Src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/stm32-doom-app.elf.dir/Startup/startup_stm32f401.s.o" -o stm32-doom-app.elf
